{{CargoRelic
|name=Linde's Fridge
|class_id=20808
|rank=Blue
|affct=TECH
|birthday=05-07
|source=
|description=On May 7, 1873 AD, Linde, a German, invented the first freezer with ammonia as the refrigerant.<br>Linde used a heat engine to create a cooling system by compressing and evaporating ammonia. It was first used in the Sedumar brewery in Wiesbaden for food preservation.
[History of Refrigerator]
Faraday made ice by using a chemical method 50 years ago. Freezer with pressure pump was invented 20 years ago. Electric refrigerators were invented in the early 20th century.
|fame=29
|art=30
|fth=30
|civ=20
|tech=45
|ss1=Per 5 Mecha Gene LVLs, Snail DEF +2<br>Per 5 Mecha Gene LVLs, Snail RUSH +2<br>Mecha Gene LVLs Researched: 150/150
|ss2=Per 5 Mecha Gene LVLs, Snail DEF +4<br>Per 5 Mecha Gene LVLs, Snail RUSH +4<br>Mecha Gene LVLs Researched: 150/150
|ss3=Per 5 Mecha Gene LVLs, Snail DEF +6<br>Per 5 Mecha Gene LVLs, Snail RUSH +6<br>Mecha Gene LVLs Researched: 150/150
|ss4=Per 5 Mecha Gene LVLs, Snail DEF +10<br>Per 5 Mecha Gene LVLs, Snail RUSH +10<br>Mecha Gene LVLs Researched: 150/150
|ss7=Per 5 Mecha Gene LVLs, Snail DEF +10<br>Per 5 Mecha Gene LVLs, Snail RUSH +10<br>Mecha Gene LVLs Researched: 150/150<br>Snail DEF +50 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Arena skill I.png|50px]]Place in Snail Arena Compass: In Snail Arena, Snail RUSH +20
}}
